purpose: Change propagation rules for cross-repo GAIA / OFIF / MeshLab / Control Tower contracts, fixtures, validators, OpenStreetMap bindings, and readiness metadata.

required_actions: Run GAIA contract fixture validation.
Update affected fixtures or validators.
Update prophet-platform progress ledger if readiness state changes.
Review Sherlock discovery records for schema drift.
Review MeshRush graph-view references when evidence/node references change.
Run GAIA contract fixture validation.
Run OFIF bridge and soil-fusion proof chain when OFIF/soil fixtures change.
Review Sherlock examples that cite changed fixture IDs.
Review MeshRush crystallization fixtures that traverse changed fixture IDs.
Run GAIA contract fixture validation for OSM bindings and map tile layer manifests.
Confirm OSM node/way/relation identity is preserved.
Confirm OSM attribution and license metadata are present.
Confirm OSM-only route or layer outputs are advisory unless additional validation exists.
Review Sherlock OSM-derived map/search records.
Do not add Lattice OSM runtime assets until executable runtime boundary is defined.
Review OFIF-to-GAIA mapping contract compatibility.
Run GAIA OFIF bridge proof if the changed fixture is consumed by GAIA.
Update MeshRush graph-view entry-node references if event IDs change.
Update progress ledger when readiness changes.
Run Sherlock result validation.
Review GAIA search record schemas and examples.
Review MeshRush graph-view artifacts that cite Sherlock result IDs.
Update capability map readiness if validation state changes.
Run MeshRush crystallization fixture validation.
Review Agentplane MeshRush execution candidate mapping.
Confirm recommended_next_action.action_boundary is preserved.
Confirm advisory artifacts remain non-runnable unless policy explicitly permits execution.
Run Agentplane MeshRush candidate validation.
Confirm advisory candidates are non-runnable.
Confirm approval_required candidates cannot run without approval-state transition.
Update progress ledger after PR merge or blocker changes.
Confirm a matching GAIA runtime boundary exists.
Confirm executable entrypoint and validation command exist in owning domain repo.
Reject speculative runtime fixtures without admission criteria.
Update capability map readiness if runtime becomes admission-ready.
Ensure progress ledger and SocioSphere capability map do not disagree on readiness states.
Run SocioSphere capability map validation if readiness states changed.
Record unresolved blockers explicitly.
Do not create implementation files until domain-home decision narrows or closes.
Review privacy and surveillance-risk requirements before any schema placement.
Update capability map blocked_items if the decision state changes.
